div.head:
No. 392.
Mr. Stallo to Mr. Bayard.

opener.dateline:
Legation of the United States,
Rome, June 28, 1887. (Received July ll.)

div.p:
Sir: The difficulties which prevented the meeting of the representatives of the several states at Rome at the time appointed by the last conferenceIndustrial Property Conference. have not yet been removed; and I was informed a few days
ago, upon inquiry at the foreign office, that the meeting may not take place for some months to come. Whenever it takes place I shall, of course, attend it, and shall deposit the protocol in question and do whatever else is necessary to give full effect to the intentions of the President and Senate.
